description: This Dart source file defines the TaleRepository class, which provides methods to perform CRUD operations and queries on tales within a database. It interacts with the database to list, retrieve, create, update, delete tales, record listens, and fetch featured tales, utilizing domain models and database helpers.

classes.name: TaleRepository
classes.description: Repository class for managing Tale entities in the database, supporting querying, creation, update, deletion, and recording listens.

methods.name: listTales
methods.description: Retrieves a list of tales filtered by optional category, age group, and search query, ordered by featured status and last update time.

methods.name: getTale
methods.description: Retrieves a single Tale by its ID.

methods.name: createTale
methods.description: Creates a new Tale record in the database with provided details.

methods.name: updateTale
methods.description: Updates an existing Tale record in the database.

methods.name: deleteTale
methods.description: Deletes a Tale record from the database by its ID.

methods.name: recordListen
methods.description: Records a listen event for a specific tale, timestamped.

methods.name: getListenCount
methods.description: Returns the total number of listens for a specific tale.

methods.name: listFeatured
methods.description: Fetches a list of featured tales, up to 10, ordered by last update.

methods.name: _taleFromRow
methods.description: Converts a database row into a Tale object.

methods.name: _categoryToDb
methods.description: Converts a TaleCategory enum to its database string representation.

methods.name: _ageGroupToDb
methods.description: Converts an AgeGroup enum to its database string representation.

methods.name: _categoryFromDb
methods.description: Converts a database string to a TaleCategory enum.

methods.name: _ageGroupFromDb
methods.description: Converts a database string to an AgeGroup enum.
